message:
fix: P1 revert failure, README file count, header comment

- Sync P1_NEW comment wording to match what's actually in the
  patched file (manual edit used different phrasing from script).
  This was causing --revert to fail for P1 with "marker found
  but exact patch text not found".
- README: "4 files" → "4 patches across 3 files" (retry.js
  gets 2 patches but it's 1 file).
- Header comment: add --uninstall to usage list.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -606,7 +606,7 @@ Google's Gemini CLI (`@google/gemini-cli`) has two bugs that make it nearly unus
 curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/misc_coding_agent_tips_and_scripts/main/fix-gemini-cli-ebadf-crash.sh | bash
 ```
 
-**What it patches (4 files, all idempotent):**
+**What it patches (4 patches across 3 files, all idempotent):**
 
 | Patch | File | Change |
 |:------|:-----|:-------|
